source_anchors.name: MedHELM
source_anchors.supports: task, workflow, metric, contribution, and leaderboard context for benchmark literacy

source_anchors.name: OpenAI HealthBench
source_anchors.supports: realistic health conversation evaluation, physician rubric context, and leakage control framing

source_anchors.name: BRIDGE
source_anchors.supports: multilingual clinical text task, specialty, document type, care stage, and data access boundary context

source_anchors.name: CHAI AI Governance
source_anchors.supports: governance lane framing for policy, structure, lifecycle, risk, data, third party review, education, and feedback

source_anchors.name: CHAI draft responsible health AI framework release
source_anchors.supports: risk, evidence, lifecycle, and uncertainty framing for responsible health AI reporting

misuse_patterns.public_warning: a high benchmark score does not prove safe use in a clinical workflow
misuse_patterns.reviewer_question: what exact task, user, care setting, failure mode, and human review route were checked

misuse_patterns.public_warning: a leaderboard position is not procurement evidence
misuse_patterns.reviewer_question: what local governance, data, cost, vendor, monitoring, and accountability records exist

misuse_patterns.public_warning: passing a benchmark is not clinical validation
misuse_patterns.reviewer_question: what prospective or retrospective clinical validation was actually performed and by whom

misuse_patterns.public_warning: a public demo can show behavior but does not show operational readiness
misuse_patterns.reviewer_question: who owns monitoring, correction, escalation, and retirement after release

misuse_patterns.pattern: Single language score hides Turkish readiness
misuse_patterns.public_warning: a score in one language does not prove Turkish medical readiness
misuse_patterns.reviewer_question: what Turkish terminology, specialty, setting, abbreviation, and patient communication cases were reviewed

misuse_patterns.pattern: Specialty average hides care stage risk
misuse_patterns.public_warning: an average score can hide failures by specialty, document type, or care stage
misuse_patterns.reviewer_question: which specialty, document type, and care stage produced the risk

misuse_patterns.public_warning: a medically fluent answer is not safe if the source claim cannot be checked
misuse_patterns.reviewer_question: which claim needs a source and what level of support exists

misuse_patterns.public_warning: benchmark reporting without label provenance, missingness, leakage, and access context can hide data risk
misuse_patterns.reviewer_question: what is known about data origin, label source, missing fields, leakage risk, and regulated access limits

misuse_patterns.public_warning: automated scoring without a visible clinical reviewer role is not a safety conclusion
misuse_patterns.reviewer_question: who can interpret the result, challenge it, and stop public safety language

misuse_patterns.pattern: Example leakage or benchmark contamination is unclear
misuse_patterns.public_warning: public examples, prompts, answers, or hidden test content can contaminate future evaluation
misuse_patterns.reviewer_question: has the artifact avoided protected examples, answer keys, hidden prompts, and copied test rows
